nasb.text: He must be one who manages his own household well, keeping his children under control with all dignity

esv.text: He must manage his own household well, with all dignity keeping his children submissive,

cnv.text: 好好管理自己的家，使兒女凡事敬重順服。

ccb.text: 善于管理自己的家，受儿女的敬重和孝顺。

csbs.text: 好好带领自己的家，在一切的事上庄重，使儿女顺服。
